description: Create a new relationship type in the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) using credentials username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. The relationship type must define 'Community Health Worker' as the 'A is to B' name, 'Client' as the 'B is to A' name, and include the description: 'Links a community health worker to their assigned client for ongoing care coordination and follow-up'.

metadata.expected_description: Links a community health worker to their assigned client for ongoing care coordination and follow-up
